footer.tagline: The complete intelligence platform for real estate professionals. Built by AI Network Agency.

landing.heroBody: PropAI transforms your real estate office into an AI-powered deal machine. Find hidden sellers, automate outreach, redesign properties, and close more deals — all inside one platform built by AI Network Agency.
landing.modulesBody: The same capabilities institutional investors pay $50,000+/yr for — bundled, integrated, and purpose-built for real estate professionals.
landing.contactBody: Tell us about your brokerage. We'll set up a personalized walkthrough and run a real owner search in your target ZIP — live, on the call.

01.title: AI Owner Search
01.desc: Query nationwide property records in seconds. Find owners by address, ZIP, equity, distress signal, or absentee status.

02.title: Contact Resolver
02.desc: Skip-trace phone, email, and social profiles for 94% of US property owners. Verified, deliverable, fast.

03.title: AI Lead Scoring
03.desc: Motivation score 0–100 from equity position, days in distress, ownership history, and situation type.

04.title: Outreach Engine
04.desc: Personalized seller letters in your voice. 68% open rate vs 22% industry standard. Launch in one click.

05.title: Vision Studio
05.desc: Photorealistic AI property redesigns in 6 styles, under 60 seconds. HD and 4K output included.

06.title: Video AI Generator
06.desc: Professional tour videos with AI voiceover and brand kit auto-applied — optimized for YouTube, Reels, TikTok.

1.d: PropAI's Search Intelligence queries nationwide property records.

2.d: Contact Resolver traces phone, email, social from 94% of US owners.

3.d: Language Engine scores motivation 0–100 from equity, distress, history.

4.d: Outreach Engine writes a letter specific to this owner's situation.

5.d: Vision Studio renders redesigns. Video Studio creates the tour video.

6.d: PropAI Agent coaches negotiation and tracks every touchpoint.

overview.signedInAs: Signed in as {{email}}. Pick a module to start adding data — everything is private to your account.

empty.description: This module is wired to your database. Add your first record or wait for the AI module rollout in the next phase.
